description: ADHS: General operating rooms minimum 360 sq ft net clear floor area per FGI 2022 as adopted by Arizona.
citation: Arizona Revised Statutes §36-405 / Arizona Administrative Code R9-10

description: ADHS: Single-bed patient rooms minimum 120 sq ft clear; two-bed rooms minimum 100 sq ft per patient.
ADHS: ICU patient space minimum 150 sq ft cubicle; open-bay ICU minimum 120 sq ft per patient.
ADHS: Emergency treatment rooms minimum 120 sq ft per treatment space.
ADHS: Patient care corridors minimum 8 ft clear width per NFPA 101.
ADHS: Operating rooms 20 ACH total, 4 ACH outside air, positive pressure, HEPA-filtered.
ADHS: All new hospital construction and licensure changes require ADHS Bureau of Medical Facilities Licensing plan review and approval.
citation: A.R.S. §36-405 / ADHS Bureau of Medical Facilities Licensing

description: ADHS: Arizona does NOT have a Certificate of Need law. Hospitals may be built without CON, but ADHS licensing and plan review are still required.
